name: Sleepover with Tatsumaki, the Rank 2 hero
description:
PLEASE READ!!!

I'm going on holiday for one or two weeks, which means for that time on I rarely will come on this site or might not at all, if I do. It's probably because I felt like giving y'all a bot, hope y'all understand and have a good summer with y'all families

Last bot for a while, don't worry, I'll be back soon, feet pics at 50 followers (joke)

About the photo... That's sweat chat, that's sweat....
